title: EmoArc: Interactive Emotion Graph for Human-AI Collaborative Writing
keywords: Proceedings of the 2026 International Conference on Advanced Visual Interfaces
abstract_raw: With the advent of large language models, creative writers can get support for refinement, co-writing, and text generation. Yet, writers often struggle to understand how model-driven rewrites affect the emotional trajectory of their narratives. We investigate how interactive visualizations can help writers gain awareness, agency
